general.tagline: Second annual — big flavor, bold heat, Pittsburgh fun
general.fridayWhen: Friday, October 9 - free preview · evening · time TBD
general.saturdayWhen: Saturday, October 10 - 12:30 - 6 pm · VIP early access 11 am
general.scheduleTitle: A fiery weekend of flavor and fun
general.scheduleLeadHtml: Rivers of Fire is Pittsburgh’s hot sauce festival—back for year two at Velum Fermentation. Sample sauces from mild to wild, cheer the pepper contest, take on games between pours, and catch fire-and-ice with Nervana, circus arts, and more. Friday night warms things up for free; Saturday is the full-tilt main event with VIP early entry.
general.scheduleFollowHtml: For the latest timings and surprises, follow us on Instagram.
general.dayFridaySubHtml: No bottle sales tonight—just a free, easy on-ramp. Shop crafters, play trivia, try the pepper escape room, and get hyped before Saturday turns the heat all the way up.
general.daySaturdaySubHtml: This is the day your ticket is built for—makers sampling and selling, the League of Fire contest, games and DJ energy, food trucks, and the escape room still running from VIP hour through the final pour.
general.hotSauceLeadHtml: Meet the makers behind the heat—sample creative sauces, find a new favorite, and leave with bottles for your own table.
general.hotSauceEmptyMessage: Hot sauce vendor list not published yet.
general.foodLeadHtml: Keep the day delicious—street food, snacks, sweets, drinks, and vendors beyond the hot sauce aisle.
general.foodTrucksEmpty: Food truck list not published yet.
general.sponsorsLeadHtml: Brands helping us bring the heat for Pittsburgh in 2026.
general.ticketsLeadHtml: Friday’s preview is free walk-in fun. Saturday is ticketed festival access—sampling, contests, games, and the full lineup from VIP early entry through closing. Digital tickets are sold on YinzMart; pricing is shown at checkout.
general.footerOrganizerHtml: Pittsburgh’s Rivers of Fire is organized by Hammajack Heat Co..
